chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.D-29 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 16.08.2022 Agha Waqar Ahmed advocate for applicant. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan advocate for respondent No.1. ----- Vakalatnama of Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan filed on behalf of respondent No.1 is taken on record. Applicant filed a direct complaint before Anti-Terrorism Court against murder of her son at the hands of police party which after procedure u/s 200 & 202 Cr.P.C has been admitted. During pendency of complaint, she filed an application u/s 193 Cr.P.C for joining respondent No.1 as accused. We have heard the parties and gone through the impugned order. It has been observed by the trial court that neither in the memo of direct complaint nor during examination of the complainant u/s 200 Cr.P.C or the witnesses u/s 202 Cr.P.C name of proposed accused has been mentioned. The case is at initial stage and prima facie there is no material against proposed accused to take cognizance of the offence against him. Confronted with such observations, learned counsel for applicant does not press this revision application and seeks permission to file a fresh one after examining the material witnesses, if in their evidence substance incriminating to respondent comes on record. This proposal has been accepted by other side. Accordingly, this revision application is dismissed as not pressed in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
